free_text: Charged particle fission of Th-232.
Circular targets of natural thorium foil were
sandwiched between high purity aluminum catcher foils.
Experim.
method
The Ge(Li) detector was a Ortec true coaxial
type with an active volume of 7.1 cm3, and a drifted
depth of 10.5 mm.
The peak-to-valley ratios of the kinetic energy spectra
of the fission fragments were measured for fission
induced by protons and deuterons from 9 to 12 MeV.
mass yields are included.
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Corrections following last EXFOR rules and Dict.
DECAY-DATA corrected in Subent 007. ERR-ANALYS update.
The error limits in the measured nuclides represent
the differences in replicate determinations of two or
more prominent photopeaks. Where no errors are listed,
the value is a result of only one photopeak analysis.
